en: What's your margin? Our margin's about, like, $70.
Yeah. I mean, that was before COVID. Now it's — I mean, it's — Well, what's it now?
Well, I can't sell because I'm sold out. When you sold everything in November, December of last year,
when did you actually ship it all? Four weeks ago.
It took forever to get them done.
Have you sold any sheets other than through crowdsourcing?
ko: 크라우드소싱 외에 다른 시트를 판매한 적이 있나요?

en: No, no, because I didn't have the inventory, and I was worried about making sure I can deliver
before I can start taking up more responsibilities.
And the shirts, did we touch on that yet? Not yet, no.
Why don't you burn those? Why are you selling T-shirts?
You can't make any money doing that. I might. What are your sales for the shirts?
So I just released the shirts co-pairing, which is underwear.
ko: 그래서 저는 속옷과 함께하는 셔츠를 방금 출시했어요.

en: And so this year we've made $270,000.
And how did you sell those? On our website.
Your ask is $212,000 for 10%, correct? Yes.
Do I know the real answer to that question? Yeah.
ko: 그 질문에 대한 진짜 답을 알고 있나요? 네.
